message:
feat(bandit): Integrate SignalBandit with auto-load for feedback learning

- Add bandit score blending to auto-load relevance scoring (configurable blend factor)
- Record auto-load events to contextual bandit for learning from implicit feedback
- Add AutoLoadConfig with learning parameters (exploration_rate, learning_rate, etc.)
- Add integration tests for learning behavior validation
- Fix missing auto_load field in test_utils arbitrary Config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
